final_prompt.prompt:
Create an illustration of a warm family reunion dinner scene (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "温馨烟火气" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 2000s Chinese family drama visual warmth (《家有儿女》era), 老上海月份牌 domestic-scene illustration tradition, contemporary 新中式 lifestyle photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered around a round table with family members gathered, photo-covered wall visible in background
Subject: must include a Chinese-style round table (圆桌), a steaming hot pot (火锅) as centerpiece, a full family group raising glasses and laughing together
Scene/backdrop: must include a wall covered in family photos as background
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, intimate atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be warm yellow (暖黄色) dominant
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
